prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京航空航天大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约380名→671名→569名→666名→657名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021年位次最低（380名），2022 年大幅后移至671名，2023年回升至569名，2024–2025年稳定在657–666名区间，近两年波动幅度约9名，趋于平稳。2025年基准位次为657名；该校在海南省综合 类招生计划：2021–2024年均为21人，2025年缩减至19人，2026年进一步缩减至16人，较2025年减少3人，缩招幅度约15.8%。缩招意味着竞争加剧，有利于位 次前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第15名→2022年第15名→2023年第14名→202 4年第12名→2025年第11名→2026年第11名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及杨昀师德失范与学术不 端事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微负面影响；抖音热度排名第56位，评价「较热」，短视频曝光量一般，无明显热度加成；历史投档异常记录中未见北航在海南出现断档 信号；第五轮学科评估中，北航拥有仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程 等7个A+学科，以及信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程、外国语言文学等4个A学科，共15个A-及以上学科，学科实力极为突出，对理工类考生吸引力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 人工智能、计算机、航空航天等北航优势专业大类社会热度持续偏高；海南省2026年高考考生总数约78,000人（较2025年67,408人增长约15.7%），考生规模大幅增 加，竞争加剧海南本科批2021–2025年分别为466→471→483→483→480分，整体平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次65 7名、2026年招生计划缩招约15.8%（位次前移）、海南省考生规模大幅增长约15.7%（位次后移）、学校排名持续上升至第11名（增强吸引力）、声誉偏负面（轻微推高位次）等 多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次约为635名，区间563–707名。缩招带来的竞争加剧效应与考生规模增长效应相互对冲，最终位次较2025年略有前移但幅度有限。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班类（未来空天领军计划）
- 人工智能（卓越人才培养试验班）
- 工科试验班类（计算与智能科学类）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班类（信息科学与技术类）
- 工科试验班类（航空航天类）
- 理科试验班类

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约635名，区间563–707名。位次在563名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（未来空天领军计划、人工智能等）；位次在635名附近建议以二档工科试验班为主力填报；位次 在707名附近可考虑三档社会科学试验班保底。北航在海南招生计划仅16人，竞争激烈，建议将二档专业作为核心志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beihang University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 380 → 671 → 569 → 666 → 657, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The ranking was lowest in 2021 (380), significantly dropped to 671 in 2022, rebounded to 569 in 2023, and stabilized in the 657–666 range in 2024–2025, with a fluctuation range of about 9 places in recent two years, trending towards stability. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 657. The enrollment plan for Beihang University in Hainan's comprehensive category: 21 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 19 in 2025, and further reduced to 16 in 2026, a decrease of 3 students compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 15.8%. Enrollment reduction means intensified competition, which favors a forward shift in ranking (smaller number).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising: 15th in 2021 → 15th in 2022 → 14th in 2023 → 12th in 2024 → 11th in 2025 → 11th in 2026, firmly among the top universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic integrity incidents, which may have a slight negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 56th, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot', general short video exposure, no significant popularity boost. No signs of admission gaps for Beihang in Hainan in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beihang has 7 A+ disciplines: Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and 4 A disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Foreign Languages and Literature, totaling 15 A- and above disciplines, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beihang's advantageous major categories such as artificial intelligence, computer science, aerospace, etc., continue to have high social popularity. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province in 2026 is about 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), with a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition. The Hainan undergraduate batch scores from 2021 to 2025 are 466 → 471 → 483 → 483 → 480, generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 657 in 2025, the enrollment plan reduction of about 15.8% in 2026 (ranking forward shift), the significant increase in Hainan candidate scale of about 15.7% (ranking backward shift), the continuous rise of the school's ranking to 11th (enhanced attractiveness), and the slightly negative reputation (slightly pushing ranking forward), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 635, with a range of 563–707. The intensified competition effect from enrollment reduction and the candidate scale growth effect offset each other, resulting in a slight forward shift in ranking compared to 2025 but with limited magnitude.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Plan)
- Artificial Intelligence (Excellent Talent Cultivation Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace)
- Science Experimental Class
- Physics (Top-Notch Student Cultivation Plan)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Law, Administrative Management, Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 635, with a range of 563–707. Candidates with rankings within 563 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Aerospace Leading Plan, Artificial Intelligence, etc.); those with rankings around 635 are advised to mainly fill in Tier 2 engineering experimental classes; those with rankings around 707 can consider Tier 3 Social Science Experimental Class as a safety option. Beihang's enrollment plan in Hainan is only 16 students, with fierce competition, so it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as core choices.
